race.comment: BLUE SHIELD (2) finds the ideal race. He's placed in all four runs to date, beaten under a length two back at Mornington before proving no match for a dominant winner in fast time at Cranbourne. Don't think there's as much opposition here, he really should be breaking through. HERE'S MATILDA (11) is a filly by Shamus Award on debut for the Maher yard who has jumped out well at Cranbourne and draws for a good run, respecting. GALACTIC GIRL (10) can improve off an even run first up at Echuca which was on bottomless ground. The debut last time in was solid form. DIAMOND EYE (9) got home well fresh to place at big odds and comes under consideration now. MONOLITHIC (6) improved nicely from his debut and can do so again.
